keyPoints: By Application Type (e.g., web, mobile, embedded, AI)
By Business Model (e.g., in-house, outsourced, commercial-off-the-shelf)
commonMistakes: Assuming all projects fit a single methodology (e.g., using agile for a highly regulated safety-critical system)
Confusing project size with project complexity (a small project can be highly complex)
Overlooking the importance of the business model and stakeholder engagement type
